title: F*** to New Skins
description: Remove New Skins from the Game leaving only Steve and Alex
body:
Get rid of new skins leaving only Steve and Alex in the game, this doesn't and probably will never support other resource packs containing any modification to offline player skins not adapted to this


<details>
<summary>Supported Packs List</summary>

- [I.... am Steve](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/i--am-steve) (Only the FTNS version)

</details>
